channels.name: Hfz. Adnan Mrkonjić
channels.subtitle: Nauči Arapski Jezik
channels.descriptionBs: Strukturirani kurs modernog standardnog arapskog na bosanskom jeziku. Hafiz Adnan Mrkonjić studirao je arapski u Kuvajtu i predavao u arapskom svijetu 5 godina. Gramatički pristup s kur'anskim primjerima. 3 nivoa.
channels.descriptionEn: Structured Modern Standard Arabic course taught in Bosnian. Hafiz Adnan Mrkonjić studied Arabic in Kuwait and taught in the Arab world for 5 years. Grammar-first approach with Quranic examples. 3 levels.

channels.name: Learn Arabic with Khasu
channels.descriptionBs: Jedan od najboljih YouTube kanala za učenje modernog standardnog arapskog. Kreator je studirao arapski u Jordanu i drži diplomu iz šerijatskog prava. Isključivo Fusha — bez dijalekata. Jasna i praktična objašnjenja. Ima i odabrane lekcije na bosanskom.
channels.descriptionEn: One of the best MSA-only channels on YouTube. Creator studied Arabic in Jordan and holds a Sharia degree. Exclusively Fusha — no dialects. Clear, practical explanations. Some videos also available in Bosnian.
